en: Now that we've made our introductions, I'd like to start with Harvey,
ko: 인사를 마쳤으니 하비부터 시작하겠습니다.

en: describing what he thinks Lewis's perspective is on the situation.
ko: 루이스가 이 상황을 어떻게 보고 있다고 생각하는지 말해주세요.

en: I don't feel comfortable. Please, just say the first thoughts that come to mind.
ko: 좀 불편한데요. 떠오르는 대로 말해주세요.

en: Huh. Let's see. Cats, ballet, Harvey Specter.
ko: 음. 어디 보자. 고양이, 발레, 하비 스펙터.

en: That is not what I sound like. All right, Lewis.
ko: 내가 그렇게 말하지 않거든. 좋아, 루이스.

en: You want to know what you sound like to me? I've been jealous of you since day one.
ko: 내가 듣기에 넌 어떻게 들리는지 알아? 첫날부터 너한테 질투했어.

en: You were always Jessica's favorite. And everyone else's.
ko: 넌 항상 제시카가 제일 좋아하는 사람이었어. 다른 모든 사람한테도.

en: You got everything I wanted without ever trying.
ko: 노력도 안 하고 내가 원하는 걸 다 가졌지.

en: In fact, I'm trying to have a baby because I think it will take my mind off you
ko: 사실 아이를 갖으려는 것도 너 생각을 안 하려고인데

en: even though I know deep inside it won't. Tell him to stop.
ko: 속으로는 안 될 거란 걸 알아. 그만하라고 해요.

en: He's being honest about his feelings, Lewis. What about your feelings about whose fault this whole thing was?
ko: 솔직하게 감정을 표현하고 있어요, 루이스. 이 일이 누구 잘못인지에 대한 감정은요?

en: What? Lewis! I should have known. You just wanted to get me in here to have him tell me this is my fault.
ko: 뭐? 루이스! 알았어야 했어. 날 여기 데려와서 내 잘못이라고 하게 하려고 한 거지.

en: It is your fault. Lewis, we are not here to discuss fault.
ko: 네 잘못이잖아. 루이스, 잘못을 따지러 온 게 아닙니다.

en: Well, then why the hell are we here? Because he took my client. He won't give her back.
ko: 그럼 왜 온 건데? 내 고객을 빼앗고 안 돌려주니까.

en: And he needs to apologize about what he just said about me having a baby.
ko: 그리고 아기 갖는 것에 대해 한 말 사과해야 해.

en: I am not apologizing about anything. You wanted me to come here.
ko: 사과 안 해. 네가 여기 오자고 했잖아.

en: You said this was a safe place. And now you can't handle what I think about you trying to have a baby.
ko: 여기가 안전한 곳이라며. 네가 아기 갖으려는 거에 대한 내 생각을 못 받아들이면서.

en: Oh, no, no. You don't get to make this my fault because it's always my fault.
ko: 아니, 안 돼. 맨날 내 잘못이니까 이번에도 내 잘못으로 만들지 마.

en: But I thought this time we could come here so you could tell him that it's his fault.
ko: 이번엔 여기 와서 그 사람한테 네 잘못이라고 해줄 줄 알았어.

en: But if all you're going to do is mock me and all you're going to do is coddle him, well, then you can keep Joan Walsh.
ko: 근데 날 놀리기만 하고 걔만 감쌀 거면 조안 월시 가져.

en: You can go to hell. And this whole session is over.
ko: 지옥이나 가. 이 상담은 끝이야.

en: What the hell did you do that for? Because you and me are going out tonight.
ko: 왜 그런 짓을 한 거야? 오늘 밤 너랑 나 나간다.

en: I'm going to say a lot of nice things to you. And there isn't going to be any record of it.
ko: 좋은 말 많이 해줄 거야. 기록도 안 남을 거고.

en: I can live with that. Wait a minute.
ko: 그거면 됐어. 잠깐.

en: How long did it take for you to come to that with Stan? About 25 minutes. Why?
ko: 스탠한테 그렇게 하는 데 얼마나 걸렸어? 25분 정도. 왜?

en: I don't believe it. You're even better at therapy than I am. Maybe I am.
ko: 못 믿겠어. 상담도 나보다 잘하네. 그럴지도.

en: But trust me, Stan likes you better than me. And he always will. You really think so?
ko: 근데 스탠은 너를 나보다 더 좋아해. 항상 그럴 거야. 진짜?

en: No, Lewis, I don't. Wait a minute. Does this mean I get to have Joan back?
ko: 아니, 루이스. 잠깐, 그러면 조안 돌려받는 거야?

en: You sure can. And your first order of business is going to be telling her we filed suit against a 16-year-old
ko: 그럼. 첫 번째 할 일은 16살짜리를 고소했다고

en: that's going to make her look like shit. What? You really did that?
ko: 조안한테 말하는 거야. 이미지 망가질 거야. 뭐? 진짜 그랬어?

en: What can I tell you, Lewis? The fear of losing you makes a man do crazy things.
ko: 뭐라 하겠어, 루이스. 널 잃을까 봐 사람이 미친 짓을 하는 거지.

en: Well, in that case, I have to show an hour pregnant. Do you want to go mudding? No, Lewis, I don't. Well...
ko: 그렇다면 한 시간 후에 약속 있어. 진흙 놀이 할래? 싫어, 루이스. 에...
